items.definition_en: A shoe is something you wear on your foot.
items.example_en: He put on his shoes before leaving.

items.definition_en: A boot is a strong shoe that covers your ankle.
items.example_en: She wore boots in the rain.

items.definition_en: A sandal is an open shoe for warm weather.
items.example_en: He likes to wear sandals in summer.

items.definition_en: A trainer is a comfortable sports shoe.
items.example_en: She bought new trainers for running.

items.definition_en: A sneaker is a soft shoe for sports or casual use.
items.example_en: He wears sneakers to school every day.

items.definition_en: A flip-flop is a simple open shoe for the beach.
items.example_en: She walked on the sand in flip-flops.

items.definition_en: A loafer is a comfortable slip-on shoe.
items.example_en: He wears loafers to work.

items.definition_en: A slipper is a soft shoe worn indoors.
items.example_en: He put on his slippers after coming home.

items.definition_en: A high heel is a shoe with a tall heel.
items.example_en: She wore high heels to the party.

items.definition_en: Wellies are long rubber boots for wet weather.
items.example_en: Children wear wellies when it rains.

items.definition_en: A moccasin is a soft shoe made of leather.
items.example_en: He chose moccasins for comfort at home.

items.definition_en: A clog is a shoe with a thick wooden sole.
items.example_en: Farmers often use clogs to work outside.

items.definition_en: A pump is a plain shoe for women.
items.example_en: She wore black pumps for the meeting.

items.definition_en: A plimsoll is a simple flat shoe for sports.
items.example_en: Children wear plimsolls in the gym at school.

items.definition_en: An espadrille is a light summer shoe with a rope sole.
items.example_en: Many people wear espadrilles on sunny days.

items.definition_en: A ballet flat is a simple flat shoe for women.
items.example_en: She chose ballet flats for comfort.

items.definition_en: An Oxford shoe is a smart lace-up shoe.
items.example_en: He bought new Oxford shoes for work.

items.definition_en: A court shoe is a smart women's shoe.
items.example_en: Court shoes are popular for office wear.

items.definition_en: A Wellington boot is a tall rubber boot.
items.example_en: Wellington boots keep your feet dry in mud.

items.definition_en: An ankle boot is a short boot that covers the ankle.
items.example_en: She wore ankle boots with jeans.
